overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing an armored character with a shield exploring a snowy coastal mountain path at sunset. The character walks through ancient stone ruins, passes under a massive stone arch, and encounters other armored figures and a wolf near the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail along cliffside with ancient ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path toward the large stone arch ahead

entered.detail: massive weathered stone archway spanning the path ahead
steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising beside the path
snow-dusted evergreen tree standing near the arch
frozen sea visible in the distance beyond the path
sparse dead shrubs poking through the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path carved into the mountainside, approaching a massive ancient stone arch. The frozen ocean is visible to the right, and sparse vegetation dots the landscape while the sun sets in the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: passage through ancient stone archway to open coast

events.description: character passes underneath the massive stone archway into more open terrain
character turns left to follow the coastal path revealing the mountain range

agents.ego_description: passing under the stone arch and turning left to follow the coastline

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible beyond the arch
tall broken stone column standing alone on the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the imposing stone arch, transitioning from the enclosed cliffside path to a more open coastal area. The camera turns left to reveal a sweeping view of the distant mountain range and frozen sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy coastline with distant ruins

events.description: two human figures become visible standing in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the open coast approaching the distant figures near the ruins

notable_agents.action: two armored figures standing near the path ahead with weapons drawn

entered.detail: massive curved ancient stone ruin rising from the coastline like a broken wall
small leafless tree with thin branches in the snow

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide open coast, the character approaches two distant figures standing near a large curved stone ruin. The frozen ocean stretches to the right while snow-capped mountains rise to the left under the dusk sky.

events.description: large black wolf walks past the character on the right side
NPCs begin moving and following the character toward the ruins

agents.ego_description: approaching the NPCs and observing the wolf, then continuing toward the ruins

notable_agents.action: armored figure with bow standing guard then following
large black wolf walking past the character toward the right

entered.detail: wooden platform structure built against the stone ruin

segments.scene_description: The character encounters two armored NPCs and a large black wolf near the ruins. The wolf passes by on the right, and the NPCs begin to follow as the character continues toward the massive curved stone structure with wooden scaffolding.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountainside that gradually opens into a wide coastal expanse at sunset. It begins with the character traversing a narrow path carved into the cliffside, moving toward a massive ancient stone arch while the frozen ocean glimmers under an orange sky. As the character passes beneath the imposing arch, the enclosed path gives way to a sweeping vista of distant mountain ranges and the icy sea. The scene then expands across the open coast toward a large curved stone ruin, where the lighting shifts toward the deeper tones of dusk. Finally, the camera closes in as the character encounters two armored figures and a large black wolf near the ruins, continuing forward toward a massive stone structure reinforced with wooden scaffolding.
